description_long: This is a mid-calf winter boot in a soft pastel pink color, featuring a plush, white faux-fur lining visible at the top opening. The exterior appears to be made of suede or a similar soft material, with decorative bows running vertically along the back side, adding a stylish touch. The sole is a light tan color, made from a textured rubber material for grip and durability. The boot has a rounded toe and a simple, seamless design on the sides, with minimal visible stitching. The back view reveals a small rectangular brand patch near the heel. The overall appearance is cozy, warm, and designed for cold weather, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A pastel pink mid-calf winter boot with a white faux-fur lining, decorative back bows, and a textured tan rubber sole. The boot is cozy, stylish, and ideal for cold urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the soft pink suede exterior, white faux-fur lining, and decorative bows on the back.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the vertical row of bows and a small brand patch above the heel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the seamless pink suede surface and the edge of the fur lining.
description_view_3: Front view showing the rounded toe, central seam, and plush fur lining at the opening.
attribute_logo: Small rectangular patch on the heel, tan with white and gold details
